name: Snowflake
description: Snowflake emphasizes its ability to unify and provide easy access to various data sources, enabling organizations to derive unprecedented insights. With a focus on data engineering and analytics, Snowflake supports developers in leveraging best practices and advanced technologies.

name: mLogica LLC
description: mLogica specializes in hyperscale big data ingestion and near-real-time analytics, providing actionable insights across various industries. Their expertise in modernizing databases and applications for large-scale engagements positions them as a key player in the big data landscape.

name: Databricks Ventures
description: Databricks is recognized as a leader in the big data space, offering a unified platform that combines the strengths of data lakes and warehouses, making it ideal for data analytics and machine learning. The company's innovative solutions are particularly beneficial for communication service providers, helping them to enhance service, reduce churn, and create new revenue streams through advanced data analytics.

name: Tableau
description: Tableau is a software publisher that specializes in data analysis and visualization, offering advanced analytics solutions that help organizations explore and visualize large datasets. By simplifying the data exploration process and integrating with platforms like Amazon Web Services, Tableau enables businesses to effectively harness the power of big data.

name: Bitorical
description: The company specializes in information technology services, with a strong focus on big data, data analysis, and artificial intelligence. As representatives of Google Cloud in Peru, they provide consultancy and custom solutions that leverage Google Cloud Platform products, enhancing businesses' digital transformation and productivity through their expertise in big data and machine learning.

name: Fragma Data Systems
description: Fragma Data Systems is a Big Data Analytics solutions provider that helps companies across various industries transform their data into valuable insights, enhancing decision-making and operational excellence.

name: GetInData
description: GetInData is a Big Data expert, specializing in creating and leading innovative projects for international clients. They focus on designing and implementing cloud-based, data-oriented solutions, and have extensive experience in building production Big Data infrastructure and real-time applications that process large data streams.

name: Inspur Cloud
description: The company offers big data storage and analysis services, highlighting their product advantages, functionalities, and application scenarios.

name: InNeed Cloud
description: InNeed is a global service provider that specializes in advanced Information Technology and Services, offering a wide range of solutions that leverage Big Data to enhance customer experiences and drive data-driven decision-making.

name: Teradata Japan, Ltd.
description: Teradata emphasizes the transformative power of data through its advanced cloud analytics and data platform, which provides harmonized data and trusted AI/ML to enhance decision-making. With a commitment to empowering organizations across various industries, Teradata enables companies to quickly capitalize on opportunities and gain valuable insights.
